name: German A1 vocabulary — Free
description: 668 German A1 vocabulary items in one drillable collection plus thematic sub-decks (greetings, numbers, family, food, time). Source: Goethe-Institut A1 Wortliste via patsytau/anki_german_a1_vocab (CC BY-SA 4.0).
license: Vocabulary data: CC BY-SA 4.0 (patsytau, github.com/patsytau/anki_german_a1_vocab). Underlying word list courtesy of the Goethe-Institut A1 Wortliste. Sub-collection grouping by Tokori. Free for everyone.

collections.name: German · Day-one greetings
collections.description: Hallo, Tschüss, danke schön — everyday phrases not on the Goethe A1 list but you want them anyway.

collections.name: German A1 · all 668 words
collections.description: Every vocabulary item on the Goethe A1 word list.

words.gloss: to be (switched) on; to be on
to be (switched) off; to be out
to receive; to have; to get
there (to that place, in that direction)
to be absent; to be missing
to work/function; to go; to be okay
to lie; to lie / be located
to do; to make; to come to; …
to bring with one / to get (sth. for sb.)

collections.name: German A1 · Pronouns & people
collections.description: I / you / we / them and the people who fill those slots.
